task: Go to the URL and complete the Ember form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/ember-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed the task by navigating to the specified URL, filling in all required fields of the Ember form, creating a dummy file for the file upload field, and submitting the form. The agent then performed thorough validation to confirm the successful submission. It identified the success message in the DOM, even though it was set to hide after 8 seconds, and verified all form field values and the file upload status programmatically. There were minor issues with REPL variable declarations and Playwright selector usage within `evaluate` calls, but the agent demonstrated strong problem-solving by correcting these issues and ultimately achieving the task's objectives.
